primary_contract: nwau_py.emergency_code_mapping_pipeline versioned, provenance-aware emergency source-field mapping bundles for UDG and AECC outputs under the emergency transition registry
completion_evidence: mapping-bundle manifests with checksums and provenance
validator tests for mapped, unmapped, invalid, deprecated, and incompatible-year cases
dry-run mapping summaries for data-quality review
documentation for onboarding future emergency mapping tables
licensing_caveats: Do not redistribute licensed emergency classification tables, manuals, or grouper outputs unless the source license explicitly permits it.
Record provenance, table version, and license boundaries for any official or locally supplied mapping source instead of committing restricted raw tables.
Do not invent or imply a UDG-to-AECC crosswalk when the source evidence does not provide one.
description: Add a versioned, provenance-aware emergency code mapping pipeline for declared source emergency-care fields, using official or locally validated mapping references and registry-driven UDG/AECC era selection.
